pages.text: $(bold)Rails are real travel.$()$(br2)Steam 'n' Rails brings full-scale trains: locomotives, passenger cars, freight cars, stations, signals. The trains run on Create steam or diesel — same fuel as the rest of the pack.$(br2)Build a line between bases. It's worth the effort.

$(bold)The Navigator.$()$(br2)$(item)Create Railways Navigator$() gives you a HUD for schedules, routes, and arrival times. Plug it into a station and the trains tell you where they're going and when they get there.$(br2)Like a real metro map. Open it from your inventory.

$(bold)Bogies & parts.$()$(br2)$(item)Blocks & Bogies$() and $(item)Train Parts$() extend Steam 'n' Rails with more car types and bogies. Browse them in JEI under $(thing)@createrailways$().$(br2)Long trains are absolutely possible. Lay enough track and they'll follow.
